details.test: Task 1: Cheapest coastal-rated clay tile under $3 with 30+ year warranty (120 tiles)
Task 2: Lighter tile for 100 m² roof using coverage calculator
Task 3: Highest-rated tile and matching related accessory added to cart
Task 4: Request up to 3 color samples of same tile series
Task 5: Save Classic Flat Concrete Tile installation guide to My Resources
Task 6: Find installer near 30301 with weekend hours and save to favorites
Task 7: Add two cheapest tiles (50 units each) to cart
Task 8: Configure 120 m² contemporary snowy terracotta roof and submit quote request
Task 9: Contractor registration with email contact preference and newsletter opt-in
